subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath hearkened unto the melodies from the precincts of the All-Merciful, in that station whose very air hath been perfumed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن استمع الالحان من شطر الرحمن فی المقام الذی طاب هوآئه بما فاحت فیه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat]
